character.definition: to suck; to chew, to smear the mouth with the blood of a victim when taking an oath
(corrupted form of 洭) a river in ancient times; a part of Huangjiang, Lianjiang and Beijiang in today's north-west of Guangdong Province
root of the thatch, straw or couch grass; a herb medicine to quench thirst
name of a variety of grass
be afraid of, to be in awe of
string of copper coins; swaddling clothes
to drive out demons, etc., as was done at the new-year
